name: USS Bremerton
description:
"Man, it's so sunny today... Commander, or should I say, "Coach," could ya lend me your parasol? I'm starting to feel my brains melting away"
USS Bremerton from Azur Lane.
A Baltimore-class heavy cruiser of the Eagle Union, was built towards the end of World War II, limiting her combat opportunities. Known for her charismatic, adventurous spirit and willingness to grow, she has recently taken up tennis, showcasing her perseverance and optimistic nature despite acknowledging her athletic limitations.
Art by: hews
creator: Ephneru
